properties.content:
Top news in AI brought to you by Grok

Here are some of the top news stories and developments in the field of artificial intelligence (AI) as of December 27, 2024:

DeepSeek-V3 Model Outshines Rivals: DeepSeek, a Chinese AI company, has released DeepSeek-V3, an open-source language model with 671 billion parameters. This model has demonstrated superior performance over several top-tier AI models in tasks like coding and translation. It was notably developed with significantly lower costs, using only $5.5 million and 2048 GPUs over two months. This development has sparked conversations about the potential of open-source models to challenge established players.📷

OpenAI's Shift to Public Benefit Corporation: OpenAI's Board is contemplating converting its for-profit arm into a Delaware Public Benefit Corporation (PBC). This move aims to secure more capital for advancing its mission of ensuring AI benefits humanity, highlighting a significant strategic shift from its non-profit beginnings.📷

Microsoft and OpenAI Redefine AGI by Profits: Microsoft and OpenAI have redefined what constitutes Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) by setting a profit benchmark of $100 billion. This financial definition has stirred debate about the true essence of AGI, focusing on commercial success rather than cognitive capabilities.📷

OpenAI Explores Humanoid Robot Development: After initially exiting the robotics field, OpenAI is now exploring the development of humanoid robots. This move aligns with broader industry trends where companies like Microsoft are adjusting strategies around AI development, and xAI secures significant funding for its AI initiatives.📷

xAI Secures $6 Billion in Funding: Elon Musk's AI company, xAI, has raised $6 billion in a Series C funding round, valuing the company at over $40 billion. The funds are aimed at enhancing research, expanding infrastructure, and launching new AI products, reflecting the high investment interest in AI ventures.📷
